name: Report
description: Structure of a single AbuseIPDB abuse report.

categories.description: AbuseIPDB category IDs that classify the report.

comment.description: Optional description and supporting log evidence.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the reported abuse event.

reporterId.description: Identifier of the reporting account (response only).

reporterCountryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the reporter.
